jurisdictional_context:
France's institutional landscape on the so-called Parental Alienation construct (syndrome d'aliénation parentale / SAP / aliénation parentale) is structured by a single political-judicial sequence running from 2023 through late 2024. The CIIVISE 2023 *Rapport final — Violences sexuelles faites aux enfants : on vous croit* extensively documented SAP allegations as a defensive technique deployed in family-court proceedings against mothers disclosing domestic or sexual violence; *loi n° 2024-233 du 18 mars 2024* then tightened the procedural framework where intrafamily violence is alleged; and in November 2024 juge Édouard Durand was not reappointed to the reconstituted CIIVISE under Sébastien Boueilh's presidency. The three events form one political sequence whose net effect is to harden the critique-camp institutional position while politicising the personnel who carried it — without, however, restoring any institutional legitimacy to SAP as a diagnostic category. MIVILUDES has on multiple occasions, in its annual reports, issued *signaux de vigilance* regarding SAP-style framings (this is a vigilance signal, not a ban — the common shorthand 'MIVILUDES a interdit le SAP' is a paraphrase error).

No French *autorité publique* endorses SAP as a diagnostic category. The Haute Autorité de Santé (HAS) has issued no *recommandation de bonne pratique* validating SAP; the Académie nationale de médecine has issued no endorsement; the Société Française de Psychiatrie de l'Enfant et de l'Adolescent et des Disciplines Associées (SFPEADA) has issued no position paper endorsing SAP; and the Conseil National de la Protection de l'Enfance (CNPE) has not endorsed the construct. Statutory baseline runs through *Code civil* arts. 373-2 and 373-2-11, which vest wide discretion in the juge aux affaires familiales (JAF), with *expertises judiciaires* a routine instrument; first-line departmental child-protection is handled by the *Cellule de recueil des informations préoccupantes* (CRIP) under *CASF* art. L226-3. Practitioner regulation runs through the Conseil national de l'Ordre des médecins (CNOM) for physicians/psychiatrists, the *titre de psychologue* protected by *loi n° 85-772 du 25 juillet 1985* (ADELI / RPPS registration), and the FFPP for the federated psychology professions.

The French recognition camp is civil-society-anchored rather than institutionally-anchored: its central NGO is ACALPA (Association Contre l'Aliénation Parentale, founded and presided by Olga Odinetz, Lyon), which functions as the recognition-camp's plaidoyer and colloque organiser. The critique camp, by contrast, is embedded across CIIVISE, the *Délégation aux droits des femmes* of the Assemblée nationale, MIPROF (*Mission interministérielle pour la protection des femmes victimes de violences*), CNPE, the *victimologie* clinical-academic field founded by Gérard Lopez, and — for the *contrôle coercitif* paradigm now displacing SAP-style readings in French academic discourse — Université Paris Nanterre via Andreea Gruev-Vintila (LAPPS EA 4386).
structural_findings: France is institutionally asymmetric, not merely numerically split: no French *autorité publique* (HAS, Académie nationale de médecine, SFPEADA, CNPE) has ever endorsed SAP as a diagnostic category. The asymmetry is institutional, not a question of headcount, and any directory that frames the French scene as a balanced recognition-vs-critique split misrepresents the institutional terrain.

The French recognition camp rests on approximately three named clinical voices (Paul Bensussan, Jean-Marc Delfieu, Jacques Biolley) plus one civil-society NGO (ACALPA, Olga Odinetz), with zero university chair, zero *société savante* endorsement, zero HAS *recommandation de bonne pratique*, and zero *Académie nationale de médecine* position paper. By contrast the critique camp is institutionally embedded across CIIVISE, *Délégation aux droits des femmes*, MIPROF, CNPE, Université Paris Nanterre, the *victimologie* clinical-academic field, and the *médecine légale* community.

MIVILUDES has issued *signaux de vigilance* on SAP-style framings in its annual reports — weaker than the popular paraphrase 'MIVILUDES a interdit le SAP' (which is incorrect) but still a real and repeated state-vigilance flag against the construct's misuse in family-court proceedings.

The CIIVISE 2023 *Rapport final*, *loi n° 2024-233 du 18 mars 2024*, and the November 2024 non-reappointment of juge Édouard Durand to the reconstituted CIIVISE under Sébastien Boueilh form a single political sequence. Net effect: critique-camp institutional position hardened, personnel politicised — but no restoration of SAP legitimacy.

Université Paris Nanterre (LAPPS EA 4386), via MCU-HDR Andreea Gruev-Vintila, is the French academic anchor for the *contrôle coercitif* paradigm, which now functions as the conceptual replacement for SAP-style readings in French peer-reviewed psychology and which shaped the 2024 *loi violences intrafamiliales*. This is the conceptual pivot of the post-2023 French scene.

entries.name: Dr. Paul Bensussan
entries.credentials: Dr., psychiatre; expert agréé par la Cour de cassation; expert près la Cour d'appel de Versailles
entries.affiliation: Pratique libérale; expertise judiciaire pénale et civile
entries.stance_notes: Primary anchor of the French recognition camp and the most-cited French clinician on aliénation parentale: author of *L'enfant programmé — Comment éviter l'aliénation parentale ?* (Odile Jacob 2017) and *Inceste : le piège du soupçon* (Belfond 2009); cited as paradigmatic recognition-camp exponent by critique-camp authors (Romito, Salmona) and by CIIVISE 2023 rapporteurs.

publications.title: L'enfant programmé — Comment éviter l'aliénation parentale ?
La dictature de l'émotion — La protection de l'enfant et ses dérives (avec F. Rault)
Inceste : le piège du soupçon

entries.verification_notes: Primary anchor of the French recognition camp; most cited French clinician on aliénation parentale; cited as paradigmatic recognition-camp exponent by critique-camp authors (Romito, Salmona, CIIVISE rapporteurs).

entries.name: Dr. Jean-Marc Delfieu
entries.credentials: Dr., psychiatre; expert près la Cour d'appel de Nîmes
entries.stance_notes: With Bensussan, one of the two French psychiatric experts whose *expertises judiciaires* explicitly invoke SAP terminology before JAF panels in southern ressorts; primary publication in the CNCEJ revue *Experts* (2005, n°67) explicitly proposes a *diagnostic et prise en charge médico-juridique* of SAP.

publications.title: Syndrome d'aliénation parentale — Diagnostic et prise en charge médico-juridique
Contribution in Hayez & Kinoo discussion / ACALPA proceedings

entries.verification_notes: With Bensussan, one of the two French psychiatric experts whose expertises judiciaires explicitly invoke SAP terminology before JAF panels in southern ressorts; primary publications in CNCEJ revue Experts.

entries.name: Olga Odinetz
entries.stance_notes: Civil-society anchor of the French recognition camp via ACALPA, the central recognition-camp NGO in France; editor of the 2014 ACALPA Paris colloque proceedings *L'aliénation parentale — Pour mieux comprendre la souffrance des enfants pris dans un conflit de loyauté* (ACALPA 2016); not a clinician — included structurally because any France PA directory omitting ACALPA misrepresents the field.

publications.title: L'aliénation parentale — Pour mieux comprendre la souffrance des enfants pris dans un conflit de loyauté (ed.)
ACALPA Rapports et plaidoyers (annual)

entries.verification_notes: NGO anchor of the French recognition camp, not a clinician; included structurally — any France PA directory omitting ACALPA misrepresents the field.

entries.name: Sophie Marinopoulos
entries.credentials: Psychologue clinicienne, psychanalyste (titre protégé loi 85-772; ADELI Loire-Atlantique)
entries.affiliation: Les Pâtes au Beurre (Nantes); contributrice Spirale (Érès)
entries.stance_notes: Bridge figure (recognition-leaning with strong nuance), NOT pure recognition. Sometimes claimed as an SAP supporter by recognition-camp commentary; her own corpus is more cautious and explicitly nuanced, offering a relational/psychodynamic reading of post-separation conflict rather than endorsing SAP as a diagnostic category. 2019 ministerial *Stratégie nationale pour la santé culturelle* report demonstrates her institutional positioning is generalist child-welfare, not PA-specific.

publications.title: Le corps bavard
Dans l'intime des mères
L'enfant n'est pas un adulte
Une stratégie nationale pour la santé culturelle (rapport ministériel)

entries.verification_notes: Important correction vs surface assumption — sometimes claimed as SAP supporter by recognition camp; her own corpus is more cautious and explicitly nuanced. Treat as a bridge figure.

entries.name: Dr. Jacques Biolley
entries.stance_notes: Francophone recognition-camp clinical reference aligned with the Bensussan / Delfieu axis; ACALPA proceedings contributor (*Aliénation parentale — diagnostic et prise en charge en consultation pédopsychiatrique*, 2012) and further writings in *Médecine & Droit* (Elsevier-Masson). Active clinical practice status non vérifié publiquement as of 2026.

publications.title: Aliénation parentale — diagnostic et prise en charge en consultation pédopsychiatrique
publications.venue: ACALPA proceedings; further writings in Médecine & Droit (Elsevier-Masson)

entries.verification_notes: Active clinical practice status non vérifié publiquement as of 2026; entry retained as a francophone recognition-camp reference aligned with Bensussan/Delfieu axis.

entries.name: Édouard Durand
entries.credentials: Magistrat, juge des enfants; ancien coordinateur national de la formation des magistrats sur les violences intrafamiliales (ENM); ancien co-président CIIVISE 2021-2024
entries.stance_notes: Single most influential French institutional voice against SAP usage in family courts; co-president of CIIVISE 2021-2024 and lead signatory of the 2023 *Rapport final — Violences sexuelles faites aux enfants : on vous croit*. November 2024 non-reappointment to the reconstituted CIIVISE under Sébastien Boueilh is a personnel/political shift, NOT an institutional rehabilitation of SAP as a diagnostic category.

publications.title: Violences conjugales et parentalité — Protéger la mère, c'est protéger l'enfant
Défendre les enfants
CIIVISE Rapport final — Violences sexuelles faites aux enfants : on vous croit

entries.verification_notes: Single most influential French institutional voice against SAP usage in family courts; non-reappointment to CIIVISE in November 2024 under Sébastien Boueilh presidency is the most consequential 2024 event in the French PA-recognition debate. Personnel shift, NOT policy reversal: no institutional rehabilitation of SAP followed.

entries.name: Andreea Gruev-Vintila
entries.credentials: MCU (Maître de conférences) en psychologie sociale, HDR; Université Paris Nanterre (LAPPS EA 4386)
entries.affiliation: Université Paris Nanterre, UFR SPSE; LAPPS EA 4386
entries.stance_notes: French academic anchor of the *contrôle coercitif* paradigm, which functions as the conceptual replacement for SAP-style readings in post-2023 French peer-reviewed psychology. Monograph *Le contrôle coercitif — Au coeur de la violence conjugale* (Dunod 2023). Auditions before the CIIVISE (2022) and the *Délégation aux droits des femmes* of the Assemblée nationale (2022-2024) shaped *loi n° 2024-233 du 18 mars 2024*. Conceptual bridge to the German *Hammer* (de.hammer-wolfgang) and Spanish (Escudero, Vaccaro, Lorente-Acosta) contrôle coercitif lines.

publications.title: Le contrôle coercitif — Au cœur de la violence conjugale
Peer-reviewed articles in Psychologie Française, Bulletin de psychologie, Pratiques psychologiques
Audition CIIVISE 2022; auditions parlementaires Délégation aux droits des femmes 2022-2024

entries.verification_notes: Coined / popularised contrôle coercitif in French academic discourse as conceptual replacement for SAP-style readings; her auditions before the Délégation aux droits des femmes shaped the 2024 loi violences intrafamiliales.

entries.name: Dr. Karen Sadlier
entries.credentials: Dr. en psychologie clinique (Boston College, équivalence française); psychologue clinicienne; ancienne directrice du Centre du psychotrauma de l'Institut de victimologie (Paris)
entries.affiliation: Pratique libérale + expertises ONVF/MIPROF; experte auprès FNSF
entries.stance_notes: Frames child rejection of an abusive parent as a psychotraumatic protective response, not as alienation; repeatedly cited in the CIIVISE 2023 *Rapport final* as clinical reference for the DV-protective-rejection reading. Editor of *L'enfant face à la violence dans le couple* (Dunod 2010) and lead clinical contributor to the MIPROF *Kit pédagogique Anna* (2016).

publications.title: L'enfant face à la violence dans le couple (ed.)
Contributions MIPROF Kit pédagogique Anna
Articles in Pratiques psychologiques, Stress et trauma

entries.verification_notes: Frames child rejection of an abusive parent as psychotraumatic protective response, not alienation; repeatedly cited in CIIVISE rapport 2023 as clinical reference for DV-protective-rejection reading.

entries.name: Pierre Lassus
entries.credentials: Dr. en philosophie + formation clinique; ancien directeur général UFSE; psychothérapeute
entries.stance_notes: Important correction vs surface assumption: Lassus is *Dr en philosophie*, NOT *psychiatre* / *Docteur en médecine*, and is therefore NOT inscrit à l'Ordre des médecins. Historic French antimaltraitance voice against SAP, formed clinically as a psychothérapeute and association director (ancien directeur général UFSE). Author of *L'enfant trahi — La maltraitance* (Stock 2001) and *Maltraitances — Enfants en souffrance* (Stock 2006).

publications.title: L'enfant trahi — La maltraitance, prévention, détection, traitement
Maltraitances — Enfants en souffrance
La sainteté de l'enfance

entries.contact: Via Albin Michel / Stock author page
entries.verification_notes: Important correction vs surface assumption — Lassus is frequently described as psychiatre; he is in fact Dr en philosophie + clinically-trained author / association director, NOT Docteur en médecine inscrit à l'Ordre des médecins. Historic French antimaltraitance voice against SAP.

entries.name: Dr. Muriel Salmona
entries.credentials: Dr., psychiatre; psychothérapeute spécialiste du psychotraumatisme; présidente Mémoire Traumatique et Victimologie
entries.affiliation: Mémoire Traumatique et Victimologie; ancienne praticienne hospitalière
entries.stance_notes: With Sadlier and Romito, the most-cited French clinical-psychiatric voice critiquing SAP as a *technique de retournement* deployed by abusers; cited in CIIVISE auditions. Author of *Le livre noir des violences sexuelles* (Dunod 2013, ré-éd. 2022) and maintains fiches techniques on the Mémoire Traumatique et Victimologie site explicitly critiquing SAP-style framings.

publications.title: Le livre noir des violences sexuelles
Châtiments corporels et violences éducatives
Fiches techniques on Mémoire Traumatique et Victimologie site critiquing SAP

entries.verification_notes: With Sadlier and Romito, the most cited French clinical-psychiatric voice critiquing SAP as a technique de retournement used by abusers; cited in CIIVISE auditions.

entries.name: Prof. Patrizia Romito
entries.credentials: Prof., professeure de psychologie sociale, Università degli Studi di Trieste (Italie); francophone-circulating reference
entries.stance_notes: Cross-border anchor: her work circulates and is taught in French psychology curricula (Université Paris Cité, Université Lyon 2) as entry-level critique-camp reference. *Un silence de mortes — La violence masculine occultée* (Syllepse 2006, French translation) is the foundational francophone reference for the critique camp's reading of SAP allegations as occultation of male violence.

publications.title: Un silence de mortes — La violence masculine occultée
Articles in Revue d'épidémiologie et de santé publique (avec M.-J. Saurel-Cubizolles)

entries.verification_notes: Cross-border anchor — work circulates and is taught in French psychology curricula (Université Paris Cité, Université Lyon 2) as entry-level critique-camp reference; foundational francophone reference for the critique camp.

entries.name: Dr. Maurice Berger
entries.credentials: Dr., pédopsychiatre; ancien chef de service psychiatrie de l'enfant CHU de Saint-Étienne; ancien chargé d'enseignement Université Lyon 2; psychanalyste
entries.affiliation: CHU de Saint-Étienne (honoraire); Université Lyon 2 (passée); REDDE
entries.stance_notes: Paradigmatic French middle-camp voice; routinely misclassified by both sides. Treats SAP with caution while affirming the clinical reality of parent erasure dynamics, and is also active on the contested *résidence alternée chez l'enfant en bas âge* (RAEJE) debate. *L'enfant et la souffrance de la séparation* (Dunod 2003, ré-éd. 2022) is his canonical middle-camp work.

publications.title: L'enfant et la souffrance de la séparation — Divorce, adoption, placement
Ces enfants qu'on sacrifie au nom de la protection de l'enfance
Sur la violence gratuite en France — Adolescents hyper-violents

entries.verification_notes: Paradigmatic French middle-camp voice; routinely misclassified by both sides. Treats SAP with caution while affirming clinical reality of parent erasure; also active on the RAEJE (résidence alternée chez l'enfant en bas âge) contested debate.

entries.name: Prof. Jean-Yves Hayez
entries.credentials: Prof., pédopsychiatre; Professeur émérite UCLouvain (Belgique); ancien chef de service pédopsychiatrie Cliniques universitaires Saint-Luc
entries.stance_notes: Canonical middle-camp citation in French JAF *expertises*: the 2005 Hayez & Kinoo *Neuropsychiatrie de l'enfance et de l'adolescence* paper *Aliénation parentale, un concept à haut risque* acknowledges the clinical reality of parental denigration dynamics while explicitly rejecting SAP as a syndromal entity. Cross-border BE-FR francophone reference.

publications.title: Aliénation parentale, un concept à haut risque (avec P. Kinoo)
publications.venue: Neuropsychiatrie de l'enfance et de l'adolescence 53(4):157-165

publications.title: La sexualité des enfants
La destructivité chez l'enfant et l'adolescent

entries.verification_notes: Canonical middle-camp citation in French JAF expertises; the 2005 Hayez & Kinoo Neuropsychiatrie de l'enfance paper acknowledges the clinical reality of parental denigration dynamics while rejecting SAP as a syndromal entity.

entries.name: Prof. Daniel Marcelli
entries.credentials: Prof. émérite de psychiatrie de l'enfant et de l'adolescent, Université de Poitiers / CHU de Poitiers; ancien président SFPEADA; PU-PH (h.)
entries.affiliation: Université de Poitiers (ém.); CHU de Poitiers (honoraire); SFPEADA
entries.stance_notes: Reference figure of French pédopsychiatrie whose institutional weight — past SFPEADA presidency, Poitiers chair, *Enfance et psychopathologie* (Elsevier-Masson, 11e éd. 2018) as the canonical French pédopsychiatrie textbook — substantially exceeds the recognition camp's institutional footprint; easily missed in PA-focused literature. Treats SAP cautiously in the textbook: describes the clinical reality of parental denigration without adopting Gardner's syndromal frame.

publications.title: Enfance et psychopathologie (11e éd.)
Adolescence et psychopathologie (avec D. Cohen)
Articles in La Psychiatrie de l'enfant (PUF), Devenir (Médecine et Hygiène)

entries.verification_notes: Reference figure of French pédopsychiatrie; treats SAP cautiously in textbook — describes clinical reality of parental denigration without adopting Gardner's syndromal frame. Institutional weight (past SFPEADA presidency, Poitiers chair) substantially exceeds recognition camp's institutional footprint — easily missed in PA-only literature.

entries.name: Dr. Roland Coutanceau
entries.credentials: Dr., psychiatre; psychiatre des hôpitaux honoraire; expert près la Cour d'appel de Versailles; président LFSM
entries.affiliation: Ligue Française pour la Santé Mentale (LFSM); pratique d'expertise
entries.stance_notes: One of the most-cited French *expertise psychiatrique* references in family-court matters; coordinates multi-author Dunod volumes including both recognition- and critique-leaning contributors (*La violence conjugale — La relation perverse* 2016; *Auteur de violence conjugale* 2017). Institutional centre of French forensic expertise — does not endorse SAP as a syndromal entity but does not categorically reject parental denigration dynamics either.

publications.title: La violence conjugale — La relation perverse (dir.)
La violence psychologique — Comprendre pour agir (dir.)
Auteur de violence conjugale (dir.)

entries.verification_notes: One of the most-cited French expertise psychiatrique references in family-court matters; coordinates multi-author volumes including both recognition- and critique-leaning contributors. Institutional centre of French forensic expertise.

entries.name: Prof. Liliane Daligand
entries.credentials: Prof. émérite de médecine légale, Université Lyon 1 / Hospices Civils de Lyon; psychiatre + médecin légiste; experte près la Cour d'appel de Lyon et près la Cour de cassation; présidente Viffil-SOS Femmes Lyon; PU-PH (h.)
entries.affiliation: Université Lyon 1 (ém.); Hospices Civils de Lyon (ém.); Viffil-SOS Femmes
entries.stance_notes: Foremost francophone *médecin légiste* on violences intrafamiliales; consistently frames child rejection of a violent parent in psychotraumatic rather than alienation terms; *expertises judiciaires* in the Cour d'appel de Lyon ressort make her the primary forensic anchor of the critique camp in that ressort. *La violence conjugale est un crime* (L'Archipel 2017).

publications.title: La violence conjugale est un crime
L'enfant maltraité — De la maltraitance à la bientraitance
Contributions to Revue francophone du stress et du trauma; Médecine et droit

entries.verification_notes: Foremost francophone médecin légiste on violences intrafamiliales; consistently frames child rejection of a violent parent in psychotraumatic rather than alienation terms; expertises judiciaires in the Cour d'appel de Lyon ressort make her primary forensic anchor of the critique camp.

entries.name: Dr. Gérard Lopez
entries.credentials: Dr., psychiatre; fondateur Institut de Victimologie (Paris); ancien chargé d'enseignement Université Paris Cité / Paris Descartes
entries.affiliation: Institut de Victimologie (Paris); ancien Université Paris Descartes
entries.stance_notes: Co-founder of the French *victimologie* clinical-academic field; consistently aligned with the critique-camp reading of SAP allegations as defensive technique in DV cases; cited in CIIVISE auditions. *Manuel de victimologie* (Dunod 2019) is the French reference manual of the field.

publications.title: Enfants violés et violentés — Le scandale ignoré (2e éd.)
Manuel de victimologie (dir.)
Dictionnaire des sciences criminelles (dir., avec S. Tzitzis)

entries.verification_notes: Co-founded the French victimologie clinical-academic field; consistently aligned with the critique-camp reading of SAP allegations as defensive technique in DV cases; cited in CIIVISE auditions; Manuel de victimologie (Dunod 2019) is the French reference manual.

excluded.exclusion_reason: Below verification threshold: no peer-reviewed publication, no judicial *expertise* trace, no institutional affiliation traceable to a primary source.
